title: A esli eto lyubov?
writer: Iosif Olshansky, Nina Rudneva, Yuli Raizman
actors: Zhanna Prokhorenko, Igor Pushkaryov, Aleksandra Nazarova
plot: High schoolers Ksenia and Boris begin to understand that the feelings they share are more than just a friendship. But their first timid sentiment became apparent to people around them. They have to confront mocking schoolmates and...
